name: Layla

availability.notes: Prefers daytime dates on weekends, evening only midweek

background: Lebanese-Canadian, marketing director at a luxury brand. Has lived in Dubai for 4 years. Loves quiet dinners and gallery walks. Close to her family in Beirut and visits every few months.

name: James

availability.notes: Works long hours Sun-Wed. Fully free on weekends.

background: British, works in private equity at DIFC. Moved to Dubai 2 years ago. Active social life but finding it hard to meet people outside the finance bubble. Plays tennis at Meydan twice a week.

name: Priya

availability.notes: Loves Friday brunches. Up for spontaneous plans.

background: Indian, UX designer at a tech startup. Moved to Dubai 1 year ago. Big social circle from the dance and fitness communities. Not looking for anything heavy right now — wants to enjoy the city.

name: Khalid

availability.notes: Friday mornings reserved for family. Available from Friday afternoon.

background: Emirati, software engineer at a government entity. Born and raised in Dubai. Family is very important to him but he is not rigid about tradition. Good cook — makes a legendary machboos. Looking for someone who values stability.

name: Sofia

availability.notes: Early riser. Prefers morning or lunch dates on weekends.

background: Spanish-Argentinian, architect at a boutique firm in DIFC. Has lived in Dubai for 6 years — longest she has lived anywhere. Runs the Creek Park loop every morning. Loves third-wave coffee shops and will judge you gently if you order a Starbucks.

name: Daniel

availability.notes: Freelancer. Flexible schedule but busiest Tue-Thu.

background: South African, freelance photographer and videographer. Splits time between editorial and commercial work. Moved to Dubai 3 years ago. Surfs at Sunset Beach, volunteers at a dog rescue on weekends. Quiet but opens up quickly one on one.

name: Amara

availability.notes: Travels for work occasionally. Prefers planning dates in advance.

background: Nigerian-British, sustainability consultant for a Dubai-based firm. Grew up in London, moved to Dubai 2 years ago. Writes a personal blog about sustainable living in the Gulf. Loves live jazz at Blue Bar. Looking for someone who thinks deeply about the world but does not take themselves too seriously.

name: Marco

availability.notes: Sails on Friday mornings. Available from Friday lunch onward.

background: Italian, managing director at an architecture consultancy. Has lived in Dubai for 5 years and considers it home. Owns a small sailboat docked at Dubai Marina Yacht Club. Passionate about history and will happily spend an afternoon at a museum. Cooks Italian food that makes people want to move in.
